questions.question: A Naive Bayes classifier with a uniform prior and a Laplace smoothing parameter of 1.0 is used for sentiment analysis on a text dataset. The feature set consists of bag-of-words, where each word is represented by its frequency. The training data is composed of 5000 examples with 2500 positive reviews and 2500 negative reviews. Calculate the posterior probability of a positive review given the word 'love' in the feature set. (5 marks)

A Naive Bayes classifier is trained on a text dataset for spam vs non-spam classification. The feature set consists of bag-of-words, where each word is represented by its frequency. The training data is composed of 1000 examples with 500 spam emails and 500 non-spam emails. The Laplace smoothing parameter is set to 0.5. Calculate the probability of a non-spam email given the word 'buy' in the feature set. (5 marks)

A Naive Bayes classifier with a uniform prior and a Laplace smoothing parameter of 1.0 is used for language modeling. The training data consists of 100,000 sentences with 50,000 sentences of English and 50,000 sentences of Spanish. Calculate the probability of a sentence being English given the words 'I' and 'am' in the sentence. (5 marks)
